test_cases.name: crud-spec-structure
test_cases.description: Generate a dashboard-first CRUD E2E spec for a collection
test_cases.prompt: Write E2E tests for the 'posts' collection. The collection has title (text), body (richText), and status (select: draft/published) fields. Write both UI tests (dashboard navigation, create, edit) and API tests (CRUD operations). Save the spec at libs/e2e-tests/src/specs/posts.spec.ts.

test_cases.name: api-spec-structure
test_cases.description: Generate API E2E tests with proper auth and assertions
test_cases.prompt: Write API-only E2E tests for the 'redirects' collection. Test CRUD operations and verify that redirect middleware works (301 status with correct Location header). Save at libs/e2e-tests/src/specs/redirects-api.spec.ts.
